description_long: This object is a retro-style arcade machine, featuring a large, boxy cabinet with a prominent display screen on the front. The screen is set within a recessed frame and currently shows a stylized magenta car, suggesting a racing or driving game. Below the screen, there is a control panel area with a visible slot and what appears to be a joystick or steering interface, as well as several buttons for user interaction. The sides of the cabinet are angular and robust, designed to withstand frequent public use. The back of the unit is plain and solid, with no visible access panels or vents. The overall construction is sturdy, likely made from a combination of metal and plastic, with a matte gray finish.
description: A robust, retro arcade machine with a large screen, control panel, and angular gray cabinet, displaying a magenta car game.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display screen, control panel, and button layout.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the screen with a magenta car graphic and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, solid back with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the screen and control area from a different perspective.
